title: VQE
description: Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) for finding the ground-state energy of a 2-qubit Ising Hamiltonian H = Z0Z1 - 0.5*X0 - 0.5*X1.

params.help: Number of qubits for the Ising Hamiltonian (currently fixed at 2 for the built-in model).
params.name: n
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 2，范围在2到6之间

params.help: Number of Ry+CNOT ansatz layers. More layers increase circuit expressibility.
params.name: layers
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 3，范围在1到10之间

params.help: Maximum number of COBYLA iterations for energy minimization.
params.name: max_iter
params.info: 请输入正整数，如 150，范围在10到1000之间
